name: Japanese Psycho
short_description: Stop the invaders and save the city in this dynamic arena third-person shooter. The city has no hope, there is only a crazy girl
detailed_description:
A private military company has summoned demons from Hell and attacked Tokyo. Residents are hiding in their homes, the police and army are doing nothing, and only one crazy girl has unsheathed her favorite guns and set out to slash everyone. The city has no hope, there is only a crazy girl

Stop the invaders and save the city in this dynamic third-person shooter

Features:

- arena third-person shooter

- destroy the maximum number of waves of enemies, die and do it again

- a large selection of weapons - shoot machine gun bursts, turn enemies into a sieve with a shotgun, throw grenades, cut with a knife, blow up with a grenade launch

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
